summary: 2 REPLACE (Gochev2019JPCB wrong-context kinetics, Foam4_2020 wrong-context timescale), 5 FIX including factual error in Vega2007 citing sentence (one-third → half); 35 entries KEEP.

per_entry.note: WEAK on uses (1)(5): primary source for adsorption kinetics; role-as-stabiliser and irreversibility claims are loosely supported
Part 3 is neutron reflectometry / pH structure study; WRONG for kinetics and energy-barrier claims. Replace with Ulaganathan2017a for kinetics uses.
Part 4 is foam stability paper; WRONG for seconds-to-minutes adsorption timescale claim (line ~612). WEAK for partial-unfolding claim.
WEAK for explicit 'kinetic energy barrier' language but overall supports adsorption kinetics of BLG variants
Supports kinetics context well; author list needs manual verification against doi:10.1016/j.colsurfa.2016.03.008
Part 2 is dilational rheology, not kinetics; WRONG for kinetics citation at line ~132. Also verify author list.
WEAK for kinetics/barrier framing but supports partial unfolding; acceptable in multi-citation group
BLG orientation at AWI depends on ionic environment confirmed
Pages 1572-1581 verified correct; [VERIFY pages] bib note can be removed
Thermally pre-stressed conformations claim verified; first author Saurabh confirmed
WEAK: explicitly a solid-surfaces review; used for AWI adsorption timescales. Add qualifier or supplement with AWI-specific reference.
Reviewer confirmed abstract proposes surface-denaturation/unfolding model; attribution of 'classical view of Graham and Phillips' is accurate
Glu89 protonation triggering Loop CD/EF reorganisation confirmed explicitly in abstract
~50 μM dimer threshold at neutral pH verified in paper
Authors Barbiroli/Iametti/Bonomi confirmed; prior wrong-author entry corrected
Citation is correct but citing sentence is wrong: 'roughly one-third' should be 'roughly half' (TIP3P ~35.8 mN/m, experiment ~72 mN/m). Fix text in main.tex Discussion.
Author count: bib lists 11, reviewer reports possible 17. Verify at scipy2016 proceedings PDF.
